competitors.name: ts-go-run-types
competitors.source: {build: () => createValidate<string[] | number[] | boolean[]>(), buildErrors: () => noErrs(createGetValidationErrors<string[] | number[] | boolean[]>())}

competitors.name: ajv
competitors.source: c({anyOf: [{type: 'array', items: {type: 'string'}}, {type: 'array', items: {type: 'number'}}, {type: 'array', items: {type: 'boolean'}}]}, {invalid: [['a', 1], [1, 'a'], 'not array', null, undefined, [null], [BigInt(1)]]})
